subject: A blue dragon exhales a vast plume of icy mist across a snowy mountainous landscape
description: A horned blue dragon, body partially turned, opens its jaws and exhales a billowing cloud of pale-blue ice crystals and fog that sweeps across the frame. Mountain peaks rise in the background; everything is dusted in frost. Mood is cold majesty, sweeping elemental power. Flavor text: 'I'll make ice chimes of your bones.'
foreground: Blue horned dragon exhaling a torrent of icy mist
background: Snowy mountain peaks in pale blue light
